flag provided but not defined: -version
Usage of loopal:
  -dangerously-skip-permissions
    	run as autopilot control agent (claude-stream)
  -mcp-config string
    	path to .mcp.json (control-agent mode)
  -mode string
    	runtime mode: pty | acp (default "pty")
  -scenario string
    	behavior scenario name (default "echo")
